result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 15:     AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mon...
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN case_owner_assignments coa ON coa.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
    AND COALESCE(coa.owner_change_events,0) <= 1
), handled_case_counts AS (
  SELECT x.owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT x.case_id) AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'

    UNION ALL

    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
  ) x
  GROUP BY x.owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT x.case_id) > 1
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT
    ntc.owner_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ntc.closeddate - ntc.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases ntc
  GROUP BY ntc.owner_id
)
SELECT a.owner_id AS agent_id
FROM avg_handle a
JOIN handled_case_counts h ON h.owner_id = a.owner_id
WHERE a.avg_handle_seconds IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN case_owner_assignments coa ON coa.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
    AND COALESCE(coa.owner_change_events,0) <= 1
), handled_case_counts AS (
  SELECT x.owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT x.case_id) AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'

    UNION ALL

    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
  ) x
  GROUP BY x.owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT x.case_id) > 1
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT
    ntc.owner_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ntc.closeddate - ntc.createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases ntc
  GROUP BY ntc.owner_id
)
SELECT a.owner_id AS agent_id
FROM avg_handle a
JOIN handled_case_counts h ON h.owner_id = a.owner_id
WHERE a.avg_handle_seconds IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

  SELECT x.owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT x.case_id) AS handled_cases

args.query:
WITH case_owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN case_owner_assignments coa ON coa.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND COALESCE(coa.owner_change_events,0) <= 1
), handled_case_counts AS (
  SELECT x.owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT x.case_id) AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')

    UNION ALL

    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  ) x
  GROUP BY x.owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT x.case_id) > 1
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT
    ntc.owner_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ntc.closed_ts - ntc.created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases ntc
  GROUP BY ntc.owner_id
)
SELECT a.owner_id AS agent_id
FROM avg_handle a
JOIN handled_case_counts h ON h.owner_id = a.owner_id
WHERE a.avg_handle_seconds IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
